mnemonics.title: Page Table Entry Bits
mnemonics.content: Please Pay My Rent Always - Present bit, Protection bits, Modified bit, Referenced bit, Accessed bit (and Caching disabled bit).

mnemonics.title: Fragmentation Types
mnemonics.content: External Fragmentation: Free memory is scattered (external to the allocated blocks). Internal Fragmentation: Wasted space inside an allocated block (internal to the page).

mnemonics.title: Address Translation Steps
mnemonics.content: Translate Like Before: TLB Lookup, Else (if miss), Browse (Page Table) -> TLB Update -> Form Address -> Access Memory.
